headline.purpose: Screen titles; the type ceiling at 20px.

body.purpose: Reading copy; sits one step softer than titles.

tiny.purpose: Nav labels and smallest meta; never required reading.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default card lift off the daylight ground; barely there.

shadows.name: interactive
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons and pressable navy chrome; a navy glow that signals 'this acts'.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Floating bottom nav and modal-level chrome.

motion.name: nav-pill-spring
motion.purpose: Shared-layout slide of the active bottom-nav pill.

breakpoints.name: app-container
breakpoints.purpose: Phone column max-width; centered on larger screens. The app is phone-only by doctrine, so this is the single layout constraint, not a responsive breakpoint.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Navy fill, white text, navy-glow shadow. The single most important action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: #091A7A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px oklch(29.4% 0.16 266.1 / 0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px oklch(29.4% 0.16 266.1 / 0.2), 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, #091A7A 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Light-blue fill, navy text, no shadow. The calmer alternative action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: #ADC8FF; color: #091A7A; font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, #091A7A 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: White surface, navy text, hairline border, rest shadow. Quiet tertiary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid oklch(29.4% 0.16 266.1 / 0.08); border-radius: 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #091A7A; font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px oklch(29% 0.063 254.3 / 0.06); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, #091A7A 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Info Chip
components.description: Chip-blue surface with navy text (13:1). Counts, meta, and small stats.
components.html: 12 due
components.css: .ds-chip-info { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 12px; background: #EAF4FF; color: #091A7A; font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: The default content surface: white, 16px radius, soft navy-tinted rest shadow, no border.
components.html:
Cathedral of Verses

8 of 12 rooms complete
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px oklch(29% 0.063 254.3 / 0.06); font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; color: #091A7A; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-body { margin: 4px 0 0; color: #4B5563; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Frosted white surface for hero/featured/floating chrome only. 24px radius, featured shadow, backdrop blur.
components.html:
Today's training

12 loci due across 3 palaces
components.css: .ds-card-glass { padding: 20px; border-radius: 24px; background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px oklch(29% 0.063 254.3 / 0.08); border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.3); font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-glass-title { margin: 0; color: #091A7A; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-glass-body { margin: 4px 0 0; color: #4B5563; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White surface, hairline navy-tinted border, 12px radius, 44px tall, navy focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(29.4% 0.16 266.1 / 0.08); border-radius: 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2C2C2C; font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7280; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, #091A7A 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Bottom Nav
components.description: Signature floating navy-glass bar. White active pill, navy active icon/label, white inactive. The app's most distinctive surface.
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 320px; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 40px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, #091A7A 62%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, #091A7A 50%, transparent)); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px oklch(29.4% 0.16 266.1 / 0.25); font-family: Lexend, system-ui, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; } .ds-nav-tab { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 72px; height: 100%; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-pill { position: absolute; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 20px; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.25); } .ds-nav-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-inner { color: #091A7A; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-label { color: #091A7A; }

narrative.overview: Mindscape is a phone-held room flooded with morning light. An atrium is the calm, sunlit hall a building grows outward from, and that is the resting state of every screen: a soft daylight gradient (light-blue to sky to white) shared by the whole app, with white cards and chrome lifted gently off it by soft, navy-tinted shadows. The identity is a single deep navy (#091A7A) used with discipline as the anchor of brand, primary action, and heading type; every other blue radiates from it. Color is carried by this cool daylight-blue family plus a warm-free ink ramp; warmth never enters through a beige background, only through the gold of a rating star or the coral of a favorited heart. Glass is rare and deliberate, reserved for floating chrome, never the default card.
keyCharacteristics: One shared daylight gradient ground under every screen.
A single navy identity anchor; all other blues radiate from it.
Soft, low, wide, navy-tinted elevation; never a hard neutral-black shadow.
Phone-only, one primary task per screen, 44px+ touch targets.
Glass as a rare signature material, not decoration.
Calm at rest, with spring-loaded delight on interaction.

rules.name: The One Navy Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one identity navy (#091A7A). Every other blue is a deliberate sibling that radiates from it; do not introduce a second 'brand blue.'

rules.name: The Cool-Daylight Rule
rules.body: Warmth enters only through accents (gold, coral), never the background. The body is never cream, beige, sand, or any warm-tinted near-white. Tinted neutrals lean toward the navy hue.

rules.name: The Navy-Text-On-Tint Rule
rules.body: On any blue tint (chip-blue, sky, light-blue), text is navy, never bright-blue, which fails contrast.

rules.name: The 20px Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Headline type tops out at 20px. This is a phone product viewed at arm's length; oversized display type is forbidden. Emphasis comes from weight and color, not scale.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Lexend carries every type role. Do not pair a second typeface; reach for a heavier weight instead.

rules.name: The Navy-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every shadow, glow, and glass tint is built from the navy hue with inline alpha, never neutral black or grey. Elevation belongs to the same light as the ground.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Purposeful Rule
rules.body: Frosted glass is reserved for hero, featured, and floating chrome. The default content surface is a plain white card with a rest shadow. Glass is a signature, never decoration.

dos: Do keep one shared daylight gradient ground under every screen; let screens float white cards over it rather than painting their own backgrounds.
Do anchor identity, primary action, and headings to the one Atrium Navy (#091A7A).
Do build every shadow, glow, and glass tint from the navy hue with inline alpha (The Navy-Tint Rule).
Do use navy text on every blue tint; reserve bright-blue for icons and large elements.
Do keep cards at 16px radius (24px for hero/glass), and clear 44px on every touch target.
Do answer presses with a spring or active:scale compression, and give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do let celebration be earned and spring-loaded (a completed session, an extended streak), then return to calm.
donts: Don't ship the dense enterprise dashboard: no data-dense panels, tiny rows, or desktop-first tables. This is phone-only, one task per screen.
Don't ship the clinical, sterile flashcard tool: retention is the engine, but the surface must feel crafted and humane, never bare-Anki joyless.
Don't ship the generic SaaS template: no cream/beige/sand body background, no identical icon-card grids, no tiny tracked uppercase eyebrows.
Don't introduce a second 'brand blue' or let warmth enter through the background.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide soft drop shadow on the same card or button.
Don't round cards past 24px, and don't pill-shape anything but tags and buttons by intent.
Don't use glass as decoration; it is reserved for hero and floating chrome.
Don't let color be the only signal of a state; pair it with shape, icon, or label.
